RT @MichaelSkolnik: all six Republican candidates for President are multi-millionaires. #WeAreThe99Percent  #NHDebate

@BobSaietta Additionally his point about the "people who have lost their jobs" who CNN has forgotten about is not entirely illegitimate. Its not like Tapper let him pontificate endlessly without answering the question either.

@BobSaietta I think repeatedly refusing to answer a direct question is valuable information for people to form an opinion on an issue. If he had answered the question it would have been even more interesting. Tapper is literally doing his job. Not attempting would be sad and irresponsible.

@BobSaietta These people and ideas don't just disappear by putting your head in the sand. There will never be a time when an interview with a strategic advisor to the president isn't informative to the American people.

@BobSaietta I don't think it is reasonable to not speak to people simply because you disagree with them. Someone lying is important information. How to handle that lying is an argument worth having, but not having the conversation at all is irresponsible imo.
@BobSaietta Whether we like him or not the dude is influential in the white house and has an impact on all of our lives, not sure I agree here
